task_completion.description: Create the travel_dashboard.html file on the Desktop
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file named 'travel_dashboard.html' visible on the Desktop GUI, or open in a text editor showing the file path '/home/ga/Desktop/travel_dashboard.html'.

task_completion.description: Include the 5 required general travel links in the HTML
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the HTML source code or the rendered page in a browser. Verify there are clickable links (or <a> tags) pointing to flightaware.com, xe.com, travel.state.gov, timeanddate.com, and weather.gov.

task_completion.description: Include at least 2 of the specified airline links in the HTML
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the HTML source code or the rendered page. Verify there are clickable links (or <a> tags) pointing to at least TWO of the following: united.com, delta.com, aa.com, southwest.com, or jetblue.com.

task_completion.description: Open Microsoft Edge settings to configure startup behavior
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Microsoft Edge open to the Settings page, specifically navigating to the 'Start, home, and new tabs' section (edge://settings/startHomeNTP).

task_completion.description: Configure Edge to open the local HTML file on startup
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Edge settings under 'When Edge starts' -> 'Open these pages', look for the exact URL 'file:///home/ga/Desktop/travel_dashboard.html' added to the list of pages.

integrity.description: Verify Edge settings were configured via the browser GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that screenshots show the Microsoft Edge settings interface being used to add the startup page, rather than terminal commands modifying browser preference files directly.

integrity.description: Verify the dashboard contains actual HTML hyperlinks
integrity.visual_evidence: Check the text editor or browser view to ensure the URLs are formatted as proper HTML anchor tags (<a href="...">) or rendered as clickable links, rather than just plain text URLs typed into a document.

integrity.description: Verify the file is saved in the correct Desktop directory
integrity.visual_evidence: Check file manager, terminal, or editor save dialogs to confirm the file is genuinely located at /home/ga/Desktop/ and not in a temporary folder or different directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating an HTML file at '/home/ga/Desktop/travel_dashboard.html' and setting it as the Edge startup page ('file:///home/ga/Desktop/travel_dashboard.html'). The HTML must contain links to 5 specific domains: flightaware.com, xe.com, travel.state.gov, timeanddate.com, and weather.gov. It must also contain links to at least 2 of these 5 airline domains: united.com, delta.com, aa.com, southwest.com, jetblue.com.
